content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Bead w1f adds a 4-line inline comment at the top of `persist_next_step_hint` (src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:724-727) documenting the atomicity-vs-crash-durability tradeoff. The comment text matches the shape prescribed in the bead spec exactly. No other product code was modified; the only other non-orchestration file in the branch is `prompt-w1f.md` at the repo root (a workflow artifact, not product code). The `.beads/issues.jsonl` update is an unrelated status transition on bead q1a. I noted that the pre-existing /// doc comment at lines 715-722 already describes the same tradeoff, so the new inline comment is somewhat redundant — but the bead explicitly mandates the inline comment and forbids any other code changes, so this is acceptable as implemented. No correctness, safety, or maintainability issues worth amending.

## Amendments

None.
